title: ATI Header Nav
description: Main header navigation links. Forum typeface, semibold weight; hover and active states use ATI primary and accent colours.

styles.css: & a{transition: color 200ms ease;} & a:hover{color: var(--wp--preset--color--primary-500); text-decoration: none;} & a:active{color: var(--wp--preset--color--primary-500); text-decoration: underline;} & a:focus-visible{color: var(--wp--preset--color--primary-500); outline: 2px solid var(--wp--preset--color--primary-500); outline-offset: 2px;}
